# Eden & Beyond

> Eden & Beyond is an independent multidisciplinary creative studio designing places, objects and experiences — boutique hotels, restaurants, private villas, bespoke furniture and creative direction. Based in Thailand, working internationally.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://edenandbeyond.studio/): Studio overview
- [About](https://edenandbeyond.studio/about.html): The studio & founder Maija
- [Services](https://edenandbeyond.studio/services.html): Creative services & process
- [Projects](https://edenandbeyond.studio/projects.html): Selected work, including Dar Mansour
- [Art by Maija](https://edenandbeyond.studio/art.html): Moroccan pop collage art & objects
- [Journal](https://edenandbeyond.studio/journal.html): Editorial on design & hospitality
- [Contact](https://edenandbeyond.studio/contact.html): Start a project

## Disciplines
- [Hospitality Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/hospitality-design.html)
- [Restaurant Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/restaurant-design.html)
- [Residential Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/residential-design.html)
- [Furniture & Object Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/furniture-object-design.html)
- [Creative Direction](https://edenandbeyond.studio/creative-direction.html)
